title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 540.045 - Qualifications and exemptions from service
text:
540.045.  Qualifications and exemptions from service. — 1.  The provisions of sections 494.400 to 494.505 relating to the qualifications and disqualifications of petit jurors and exemptions from service as a petit juror are applicable to grand jurors drawn and selected under the provisions of this chapter.
  2.  In addition thereto, any person who has served as a member or alternate of a grand jury, or alternate, within ten years next preceding his selection shall not be eligible for service as a grand juror.
(L. 1959 S.B. 246 § 4 (§540.025), A.L. 1984 S.B. 602, A.L. 1989 S.B. 127, et al.)
